The third hundred years ship had twice as many as the second, so it had 2 * 2S = <<2*2=4>>4S people. All the ships had S + 2S + 4S = 7S = 847 people. Thus, the ship that the monster ate in the first hundred years had S = 847 / 7 = <<847/7=121>>121 people on it.
